title: Qualified Pipeline Conversion
summary: Conversion declined, but the available evidence does not yet identify which pipeline stage or obstacle explains the change.
currentCondition: Qualified-pipeline conversion declined from 20% to 14% while lead volume remained stable.
goal: Restore qualified-pipeline conversion to at least 20% for the next complete quarter.

obstacles.statement: A stage-level loss may explain the decline, but stage data is unavailable.

constraints.statement: Customer data must remain under the existing retention policy.
The CRM platform cannot change this quarter.

successCriteria: Qualified-pipeline conversion is at least 20% for one complete quarter.
The measurement uses the existing qualified-lead definition.
scopeExclusions: Selecting or implementing a CRM before the obstacle is validated.
assumptions: Lead quality is comparable across the measured periods.
missingInformation: Stage-level conversion and loss reasons for both periods.
nextStep: Collect stage-level conversion evidence before selecting a downstream skill.
